The actual unrolled loop has a stride of 4 (dim_idx -= 4) and processes 4 elements per iteration. The comment change has no effect on the compiled code. Therefore, the mutant is semantically identical to the original. The testing already confirmed bitwise identical outputs across many seeds and stress policies. It is truly unkillable under the fixed-shape contract because the mutation does not affect the computation.
